name: Chernivtsi Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the historic colour of the principality of Moldavia and the Hutsul lands; piety and regional identity

description: Three horizontal stripes — purple, white, purple — with the coat of arms of Chernivtsi Oblast charged in the centre.
history: Officially adopted on 12 December 2001. Chernivtsi Oblast (historic northern Bukovina and Hertsa region) has a culturally diverse history under Moldavian, Ottoman, Austrian, Romanian, and Soviet rule.
